entries.content: Shipped the weather card refactor and it felt clean. Good momentum heading into the week.
Long day of meetings, not much deep work. Felt scattered but kept things moving.
Hit a frustrating bug in the log server that ate most of the afternoon. Drained.
Took a proper lunch break and a walk. Came back sharper and closed two tickets.
Quiet day. Mostly planning and reading docs, nothing dramatic.
Wrapped the sprint a little behind, but the demo went better than expected.
Shipped the weather card refactor and it felt clean. Good momentum heading into the week.
Slow start to the day but got through my task list by the afternoon. Took a short walk in the evening — needed the reset.
Felt scattered most of the morning. Too many tabs open, literally and mentally. Closed everything and focused on one thing — helped a lot.
Good flow today. Knocked out a couple of lingering todos and had a solid lunch break. Feeling more on top of things.
Pre-holiday energy made it hard to focus. Did some light reading and planning for next week instead. Not the most productive but felt intentional.
4th of July! Took the full day off. Grilled outside, watched fireworks, and genuinely unplugged. Exactly what I needed.
